name: Login Successful After Scan Attempt
notes: Reports a successful log in to a host after recon has been performed against the network.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success in order with the same IP from the previous source
conditions_text: when at least 1 of these Authentication: Login Failures Across Multiple Hosts, Recon: Remote SSH Server Scanner, Recon: Remote Proxy Server Scanner, Recon: Remote RPC Server Scanner, Recon: Remote LDAP Server Scanner, Recon: Remote IRC Server Scanner, Recon: Remote FTP Scanner, Recon: Remote Database Scanner, Recon: Local SSH Server Scanner, Recon: Local IRC Server Scanner, Recon: Local FTP Scanner, Recon: Local Database Scanner, Recon: Local  LDAP Server Scanner, in any order, with the same source IP followed by at least 1 of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success in order with the same IP from the previous source, within 30 minutes
thresholds: when at least 1 of these Authentication: Login Failures Across Multiple Hosts, Recon: Remote SSH Server Scanner, Recon: Remote Proxy Server Scanner, Recon: Remote RPC Server Scanner, Recon: Remote LDAP Server Scanner, Recon: Remote IRC Server Scanner, Recon: Remote FTP Scanner, Recon: Remote Database Scanner, Recon: Local SSH Server Scanner, Recon: Local IRC Server Scanner, Recon: Local FTP Scanner, Recon: Local Database Scanner, Recon: Local  LDAP Server Scanner, in any order, with the same source IP followed by at least 1 of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success in order with the same IP from the previous source, within 30 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Login Successful After Scan Attempt on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when at least 1 of these Authentication: Login Failures Across Multiple Hosts, Recon: Remote SSH Server Scanner, Recon: Remote Proxy Server Scanner, Recon: Remote RPC Server Scanner, Recon: Remote LDAP Server Scanner, Recon: Remote IRC Server Scanner, Recon: Remote FTP Scanner, Recon: Remote Database Scanner, Recon: Local SSH Server Scanner, Recon: Local IRC Server Scanner, Recon: Local FTP Scanner, Recon: Local Database Scanner, Recon: Local  LDAP Server Scanner, in any order, with the same source IP followed by at least 1 of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success in order with the same IP from the previous source, within 30 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Scan Followed By Successful Login

Event description: Detected a source IP scanning the network for typical authentication services followed by a successful login.  It is not typical for hosts to scan the network before authenticating.  This offense should be treated as suspicious.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should not contribute to the naming of the associated offense(s)
